content.title: Fix CLI integration tests for next-todo-only change
content.description:
The next-todo-only change (mp9zda04cp) updated tracker.ts and tracker-next.test.ts but missed 3 CLI integration tests in tests/cli/commands.test.ts. These tests create issues without specifying status: 'todo', so next() can't find them anymore. 

Failing tests:
- CLI commands > next > returns the best issue for a user (line ~900)
- CLI commands > next > excludes blocked issues (line ~921)
- CLI commands > next > resolved blockage treated as unblocked (line ~977)

Fix: Add status: 'todo' to all issue create calls in the 'next' describe block of tests/cli/commands.test.ts, matching what was done in tracker-next.test.ts.

Acceptance: All 573 tests pass (0 fail).

content.content: Verified: all 573 tests pass (0 fail). The fix was already applied — all issue create calls in the 'next' describe block of tests/cli/commands.test.ts already include --status todo. No code changes were needed. Typecheck, lint, and all tests pass.
